overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a desert highway in a futuristic cyberpunk setting, with moderate vehicle traffic passing by and a neon-lit city skyline visible in the distance. The clip transitions to an aerial drone view in the final seconds, revealing the highway interchange and massive floating billboards. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: red pickup truck passes by on the left side of the highway
green sports car overtakes from behind on the left
red van and silver sedan pass by in opposite directions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk parallel to the highway, heading toward the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck driving past in the opposite direction
green sports car overtaking and speeding away toward the city

entered.detail: multi-lane black asphalt road with yellow dividing lines
light-colored concrete pavement running parallel to the highway
tall wooden utility poles with transformers and power lines running along the road
overhead electrical cables stretching toward the horizon
dry bushes and sparse vegetation on the sandy roadside
distinctive desert trees with spiky branches scattered across the landscape
cyberpunk cityscape with tall glass towers and neon lights on the horizon
tall glowing holographic structures displaying advertisements above the city

segments.scene_description: The camera walks steadily along a desert highway sidewalk, passing utility poles and dry vegetation. Various vehicles including trucks and sports cars pass by on the asphalt road. In the distance, a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline rises against the clear blue sky, punctuated by massive holographic advertising towers.

events.description: camera transitions from first-person ground level to aerial drone view overlooking the highway system

agents.ego_description: aerial observation of the highway interchange and surrounding industrial desert landscape

entered.detail: complex highway overpasses and ramps forming a multi-level road junction
massive floating rectangular advertisement screens hovering above the landscape
derelict industrial structures and construction frameworks near the city
curved elevated roadways connecting different levels of the interchange

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically to an aerial view revealing the full scope of the highway interchange below. Massive flying billboards hover in the air near derelict industrial structures, while the distant city now appears to the right. The camera moves smoothly over the desert terrain, showcasing the scale of the infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins as a grounded walk along a desert highway and transforms into a sweeping aerial perspective of a futuristic landscape. It begins on a sidewalk beside utility poles and dry vegetation, moving steadily past trucks and sports cars while a cyberpunk city skyline with holographic towers looms in the distance. As the perspective shifts dramatically upward, the grounded view gives way to a high-altitude drone shot that reveals the full scale of the highway interchange below. The scene then expands to showcase massive flying billboards hovering near derelict industrial structures, with the distant city shifting to the right as the camera glides smoothly over the vast desert terrain.
